findings.title: Zero test coverage for derivePluginName()
findings.issue: derivePluginName() has no unit tests. tasks.md specifies 7 test cases. None exist.
findings.suggestion: Add 7 test cases from T-001 test plan.
findings.impact: Regressions to plugin name derivation would go undetected.

findings.title: Zero test coverage for publishSkill pluginName wiring
findings.issue: publishSkill() pluginName behavior has no tests. tasks.md specifies 3 test cases.
findings.suggestion: Add tests verifying upsert is called with correct pluginName.
findings.impact: Silent regression if publishSkill is refactored.

findings.title: Zero test coverage for CLI find pluginName display
findings.issue: find.ts pluginName display has no tests. tasks.md specifies 4 test cases.
findings.suggestion: Add TTY and piped mode tests for pluginName suffix.

findings.title: Backfill cannot clear incorrect pluginName values
findings.issue: Update logic skips null pluginName values. AC-US3-03 not fully satisfied.
findings.suggestion: Always set pluginName in update (drop conditional spread).
findings.impact: Low in practice — pluginName is only set by system.

findings.title: derivePluginName() lowercases output vs spec 'raw folder name'
findings.issue: .toLowerCase() applied to plugin folder name despite spec saying 'raw folder name only'.
findings.impact: Minimal — all plugin folders are already lowercase.

notes: XSS issue found and fixed in-session (SearchPalette no-query path). Implementation logic is correct. Main gap is zero test coverage for new code.
